description: Controlled subtag vocabulary for GAQP domain_tags_pipe field. Subtags are nouns and proper names only — formats, channels, categories, models, and segments. Descriptive classification is handled by claim_type. Format: Sector:SubtagCode (e.g. RET:BIGBOX).
usage_note: A nugget's domain_tags_pipe may carry one or more subtags from one or more sectors, pipe-delimited. Subtags are not mutually exclusive within a sector. Use the most specific applicable tag(s).

subtags.name: Buy Online Pick Up In Store (BOPIS)

dimensions.dimension: Food Processing Inputs & Ag Supply Chain

subtags.name: C4ISR (Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance, Reconnaissance)
TRevPAR / Total Revenue Per Available Room
